calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Continued To Apr-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Sarah Gadye.

Mrs. Navia requested a 30-day continuance stating that she needs to get the waivers of accounting. Status on close of estate is continued to April 23, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. is to file her petition by April 9, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Continued To Mar-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Marta Eisenberg appeared via zoom for Sarah R. Gayde (executor).

Ms. Eisenberg stated that client was having issues, that they received the last distribution on January 03, and that it will take 6 to 8 weeks to file the final distribution. The matter is continued to March 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Visting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-05-2010 is admitted to probate. Sarah R. Gadye is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-09-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
